reviews.school_name: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan's Vidyashram - Rajendranagar mandal
reviews.author: rk
reviews.review_body: School is ok , but the management is bad......and the NIRD Staff and Security behaviour is very rude some times they make the rules and they break the rules..........if any body asking any thing about rules  then they telling your outers , I can't understand what is the difference between out side students and campus students about rules some times they suggest cancel the admission and go away ......................................It's a suggestion purpose only.

reviews.author: Rakesh Kumar Karanam

reviews.school_name: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan's Vidyashram - Rajendranagar mandal
reviews.author: Amrutham devendar Devendar

reviews.school_name: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan's Vidyashram - Rajendranagar mandal
reviews.author: Sam World
reviews.review_body: I had memories of this school of 12 long years. The best school in terms of teaching, extra circular and co circular activities. A good teaching staff. The school is enriched in cultural values and teaches proper behaviour, traditional and cultural values to students.

reviews.school_name: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan's Vidyashram - Rajendranagar mandal
reviews.author: Abdul Aziz
reviews.review_body: I have studied in this school for 12 years. I can assure this is one of the best school in Hyderabad. The surroundings of this school, the experienced faculty and weekly activities for children. Everything is good here!

reviews.school_name: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan's Vidyashram - Rajendranagar mandal
reviews.author: Venkatarami Reddy Mallavarapu
reviews.review_body: My kids are studying there. It's very good school. Teaching staff are highly qualified.

reviews.school_name: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan's Vidyashram - Rajendranagar mandal
reviews.author: Simon Vijayan

reviews.school_name: Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan's Vidyashram - Rajendranagar mandal
reviews.author: Raghavender Reddy
reviews.review_body: My daughter is studying in this school and She is enjoying going to school. Apart from education there are Several activities for kids in this school like painting, drawing, sports etc.. I'm seeing so much change in my kid.
